'''鈭歜-s-n''' ('''basana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigger|jigger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigger|jigger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-s-n
|-
! Lemma
| basana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:basanithi|basanithi]] || [[word:basaniji|basaniji]] || [[word:basanishi|basanishi]] || [[word:basani|basani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:basanuthuth|basanuthuth]] || [[word:basanujuj|basanujuj]] || [[word:basanushush|basanushush]] || [[word:basan|basan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:basanuthu|basanuthu]] || [[word:basanuju|basanuju]] || [[word:basanushu|basanushu]] || [[word:basanu|basanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:basanufuth|basanufuth]] || [[word:basanufuj|basanufuj]] || [[word:basanufush|basanufush]] || [[word:basanuf|basanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:basanethe|basanethe]] || [[word:basaneje|basaneje]] || [[word:basaneshe|basaneshe]] || [[word:basane|basane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:basanothoth|basanothoth]] || [[word:basanojoj|basanojoj]] || [[word:basanoshosh|basanoshosh]] || [[word:basan|basan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:basanotho|basanotho]] || [[word:basanojo|basanojo]] || [[word:basanosho|basanosho]] || [[word:basano|basano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:basanofoth|basanofoth]] || [[word:basanofoj|basanofoj]] || [[word:basanofosh|basanofosh]] || [[word:basanof|basanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:basan忙th忙|basan忙th忙]] || [[word:basan忙j忙|basan忙j忙]] || [[word:basan忙sh忙|basan忙sh忙]] || [[word:basan忙|basan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:basanathath|basanathath]] || [[word:basanajaj|basanajaj]] || [[word:basanashash|basanashash]] || [[word:basan|basan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:basanatha|basanatha]] || [[word:basanaja|basanaja]] || [[word:basanasha|basanasha]] || [[word:basana|basana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:basanafath|basanafath]] || [[word:basanafaj|basanafaj]] || [[word:basanafash|basanafash]] || [[word:basanaf|basanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:basanasha|basanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobasanasha|gobasanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibasanasha|gokibasanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:basan眉sha|basan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobasankn眉sha|gobasankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibasan眉sha|gokibasan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:basansh毛sha|basansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobasanksh毛sha|gobasanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibasansh毛sha|gokibasansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:basanrosha|basanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasankrosha|gobasankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasanrosha|gokibasanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:basanmusha|basanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasankmusha|gobasankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasanmusha|gokibasanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:basansherasha|basansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobasanksherasha|gobasanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibasansherasha|gokibasansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:basangasha|basangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobasankngasha|gobasankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibasangasha|gokibasangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:basanyasha|basanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobasankyasha|gobasankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibasanyasha|gokibasanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:basanyamasha|basanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobasankyamasha|gobasankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibasanyamasha|gokibasanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:basan眉sh毛sha|basan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasankn眉sh毛sha|gobasankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasan眉sh毛sha|gokibasan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basan眉rosha|basan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasankn眉rosha|gobasankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasan眉rosha|gokibasan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basan眉musha|basan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasankn眉musha|gobasankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasan眉musha|gokibasan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:basansh毛n眉sha|basansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasanksh毛n眉sha|gobasanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasansh毛n眉sha|gokibasansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basansh毛rosha|basansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasanksh毛rosha|gobasanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasansh毛rosha|gokibasansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basansh毛musha|basansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasanksh毛musha|gobasanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasansh毛musha|gokibasansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:basanron眉sha|basanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasankron眉sha|gobasankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasanron眉sha|gokibasanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:basanrosh毛sha|basanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasankrosh毛sha|gobasankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasanrosh毛sha|gokibasanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basanromusha|basanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasankromusha|gobasankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasanromusha|gokibasanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:basanmun眉sha|basanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasankmun眉sha|gobasankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasanmun眉sha|gokibasanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:basanmush毛sha|basanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasankmush毛sha|gobasankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasanmush毛sha|gokibasanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basanmurosha|basanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasankmurosha|gobasankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasanmurosha|gokibasanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:basan|basan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙s忙n|b忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobasan|hobasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙s忙n|hob忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobasan|hohobasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙s忙n|hohob忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉basan|n眉basan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙s忙n|n眉b忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉basan|n眉n眉basan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙s忙n|n眉n眉b忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂basan|n茂basan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙s忙n|n茂b忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂basan|n茂n茂basan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙s忙n|n茂n茂b忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubasan|lubasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙s忙n|lub忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubasan|lulubasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙s忙n|lulub忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libasan|libasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙s忙n|lib忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibasan|lilibasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙s忙n|lilib忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobasan|kobasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙s忙n|kob忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobasan|kokobasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙s忙n|kokob忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebasan|kebasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙s忙n|keb忙s忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebasan|kekebasan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙s忙n|kekeb忙s忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
